proyectos.descripcion_listado: Digital control tower for international cargo management. Streamlines tracking and quoting, eliminating operational chaos.
proyectos.desafio: Moving global freight used to be a nightmare of endless emails and spreadsheets to generate documents, reports, etc. Agencies wasted hours manually tracking containers.
proyectos.solucion: Designed LogIA as the central brain. It streamlines tracking of cargo like containers, packages, etc., and turns hours of quoting math into a couple of clicks, generating more professional documents.
logros: Centralization of master data such as clients, shipping lines, ports, cargo, etc.
90% reduction in quoting and document creation time
Structured interface to reduce visual fatigue
Swift tracking with major carriers (Maersk, MSC, etc.)
Electronic billing for freight, transport, and warehousing services, with or without withholding tax (detracción)

proyectos.descripcion_listado: High-end e-commerce ecosystem for selling gym and homegym equipment. Clean, elegant design optimized for SEO.
proyectos.titulo_modal:
E&G Fitness
Elite Training Platform
proyectos.desafio: Create a digital interface that matches the purchase experience of high-end equipment with online shopping functionality, while also allowing the administrator to manage these sales.
proyectos.solucion: Platform that combines a Django backend with ultra-optimized Vanilla JS for instant filtering and navigation within the store's product catalog.
logros: Elegant minimalist design adapted to the industry
Scalable e-commerce with a smart dashboard for e-commerce administration
Integrated POS system for physical store sales
Automated email notifications upon product purchase
Professional email management for marketing, product promotion, discounts, and coupons
Leading SEO positioning in its niche

proyectos.descripcion_listado: SPA - Landing page for an international logistics company specializing in cargo transport, customs, etc.
proyectos.desafio: Transform the complexity of foreign trade into a fluid digital experience, allowing clients to manage freights, customs, and insurance from a single SPA platform.
proyectos.solucion: Development of a high-performance Single Page Application (SPA) with a focus on speed and visual clarity, integrating tracking modules, dynamic quotations, and express cargo services.

proyectos.descripcion_listado: Autonomous conversational agent trained for B2B lead qualification that triples conversion rates.
proyectos.desafio: Sales team spent 70% of their time on unqualified prospects arriving in mass volumes.
proyectos.solucion: Deployed an AI Agent using n8n for orchestration and OpenAI with RAG. Filters and notifies CRM asynchronously.
